channel.title: GitHub Apex Daily Trending
channel.description: Daily Trending of Apex in GitHub

item.title: SalesforceFoundation/NPSP
item.description: The current version of the Salesforce.org Nonprofit Success Pack

item.title: developerforce/trailhead-code-samples
item.description: Public code samples to support Trailhead challenges

item.title: jongpie/NebulaLogger
item.description: Designed for Salesforce admins, developers & architects. A robust logger for Apex, Flow, Process Builder & Integrations.

item.title: financialforcedev/apex-mdapi
item.description: Apex Wrapper for the Salesforce Metadata API

item.title: davidsbond/forcelog
item.description: A structured, extensible logger for Salesforce Apex

item.title: apex-enterprise-patterns/fflib-apex-common
item.description: Common Apex Library supporting Apex Enterprise Patterns and much more!

item.title: alexed1/LightningFlowComponents
item.description: A collection of unofficial Flow extensions that can be used to enhance Salesforce Flow and Flow Orchestrator.
